allow: Bash(cd "F:/Documents/GitHub/TemperatureMonitor/BinWatchApp" && sqlite3 BinWatch.db "SELECT RomCode, ModuleMac, BinId, CableId, SensorNum, Enabled, Offset, MaxTemp, Label, RawUserData, ManualLocation, FormatId FROM Sensors LIMIT 3;")

Bash(sqlite3 "D:\\Sync\\BinTempsData\\BinTemps.db" "SELECT s.RomCode, s.BinId, s.CableId, s.SensorNum, s.RawUserData FROM Sensors s INNER JOIN Modules m ON s.ModuleMac = m.MacAddress WHERE m.ModuleId = 3 ORDER BY s.RawUserData;" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "
Add-Type -Path 'F:\\Documents\\GitHub\\TemperatureMonitor\\BinWatchSource\\packages\\System.Data.SQLite.Core.1.0.119.0\\lib\\net46\\System.Data.SQLite.dll'
\\$conn = New-Object System.Data.SQLite.SQLiteConnection\('Data Source=D:\\Sync\\BinTempsData\\BinTemps.db;Read Only=True'\)
\\$conn.Open\(\)
\\$cmd = \\$conn.CreateCommand\(\)
\\$cmd.CommandText = \\"SELECT s.RomCode, s.BinId, s.CableId, s.SensorNum, s.RawUserData FROM Sensors s INNER JOIN Modules m ON s.ModuleMac = m.MacAddress WHERE m.ModuleId = 3 ORDER BY s.RawUserData\\"
\\$reader = \\$cmd.ExecuteReader\(\)
while\(\\$reader.Read\(\)\) { Write-Host \(\\$reader['RomCode'], \\$reader['BinId'], \\$reader['CableId'], \\$reader['SensorNum'], \('0x{0:X4}' -f [int]\\$reader['RawUserData']\)\) }
\\$conn.Close\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(powershell -Command "
Add-Type -Path 'F:\\Documents\\GitHub\\TemperatureMonitor\\BinWatchSource\\packages\\Stub.System.Data.SQLite.Core.NetFramework.1.0.119.0\\lib\\net46\\System.Data.SQLite.dll'
\\$conn = New-Object System.Data.SQLite.SQLiteConnection\('Data Source=D:\\Sync\\BinTempsData\\BinTemps.db;Read Only=True'\)
\\$conn.Open\(\)
\\$cmd = \\$conn.CreateCommand\(\)
\\$cmd.CommandText = \\"SELECT m.ModuleId, m.Name, s.BinId, s.CableId, s.SensorNum, s.RawUserData FROM Sensors s LEFT JOIN Modules m ON s.ModuleMac = m.MacAddress ORDER BY m.ModuleId, s.RawUserData\\"
\\$reader = \\$cmd.ExecuteReader\(\)
while\(\\$reader.Read\(\)\) { Write-Host \('{0,-4} {1,-12} Bin={2} Cable={3} Sensor={4} Raw={5:X4}' -f \\$reader['ModuleId'], \\$reader['Name'], \\$reader['BinId'], \\$reader['CableId'], \\$reader['SensorNum'], [int]\\$reader['RawUserData']\) }
\\$conn.Close\(\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd "F:\\Documents\\GitHub\\TemperatureMonitor\\BinWatchApp" && powershell -Command "
Add-Type -Path 'F:\\Documents\\GitHub\\TemperatureMonitor\\BinWatchSource\\BinWatch\\packages\\Stub.System.Data.SQLite.Core.NetFramework.1.0.119.0\\lib\\net46\\System.Data.SQLite.dll'
\\$conn = New-Object System.Data.SQLite.SQLiteConnection\('Data Source=BinWatch.db;Version=3;'\)
\\$conn.Open\(\)
\\$cmd = \\$conn.CreateCommand\(\)
\\$cmd.CommandText = \\"SELECT s.RomCode, s.RawUserData, s.BinId, s.CableId, s.SensorNum, m.Name FROM Sensors s LEFT JOIN Modules m ON s.ModuleMac=m.MacAddress WHERE m.ModuleId=3 OR m.Name LIKE '%11%' ORDER BY s.RawUserData\\"
\\$r = \\$cmd.ExecuteReader\(\)
while\(\\$r.Read\(\)\) { Write-Host \(\\"{0}  raw={1:X4}  bin={2}  cable={3}  sensor={4}  mod={5}\\" -f \\$r[0],\\$r[1],\\$r[2],\\$r[3],\\$r[4],\\$r[5]\) }
\\$conn.Close\(\)
")

Bash(cd "F:\\Documents\\GitHub\\TemperatureMonitor\\BinWatchApp" && powershell -Command "
Add-Type -Path 'F:\\Documents\\GitHub\\TemperatureMonitor\\BinWatchApp\\System.Data.SQLite.dll'
\\$conn = New-Object System.Data.SQLite.SQLiteConnection\('Data Source=BinWatch.db;Version=3;'\)
\\$conn.Open\(\)
\\$cmd = \\$conn.CreateCommand\(\)
\\$cmd.CommandText = \\"SELECT s.RomCode, s.RawUserData, s.BinId, s.CableId, s.SensorNum FROM Sensors s LEFT JOIN Modules m ON s.ModuleMac=m.MacAddress WHERE m.ModuleId=3 ORDER BY s.RawUserData\\"

\\$conn.Close\(\)
")

Bash(cd "F:\\Documents\\GitHub\\TemperatureMonitor\\BinWatchApp" && powershell -Command "
Add-Type -Path 'F:\\Documents\\GitHub\\TemperatureMonitor\\BinWatchApp\\System.Data.SQLite.dll'
\\$conn = New-Object System.Data.SQLite.SQLiteConnection\('Data Source=BinWatch.db;Version=3;'\)
\\$conn.Open\(\)
\\$cmd = \\$conn.CreateCommand\(\)
\\$cmd.CommandText = 'SELECT s.RomCode, s.RawUserData, s.BinId, s.CableId, s.SensorNum, m.ModuleId, m.Name FROM Sensors s LEFT JOIN Modules m ON s.ModuleMac=m.MacAddress ORDER BY m.ModuleId, s.RawUserData'
\\$r = \\$cmd.ExecuteReader\(\)
while\(\\$r.Read\(\)\) { Write-Host \('{0}  raw={1}  bin={2}  cable={3}  sensor={4}  modId={5}  modName={6}' -f \\$r[0],\\$r[1],\\$r[2],\\$r[3],\\$r[4],\\$r[5],\\$r[6]\) }
\\$conn.Close\(\)
")

Bash(cd "F:\\Documents\\GitHub\\TemperatureMonitor\\BinWatchApp" && powershell -Command "
Add-Type -Path 'F:\\Documents\\GitHub\\TemperatureMonitor\\BinWatchApp\\System.Data.SQLite.dll'
\\$conn = New-Object System.Data.SQLite.SQLiteConnection\('Data Source=BinWatch.db;Version=3;'\)
\\$conn.Open\(\)
\\$cmd = \\$conn.CreateCommand\(\)
\\$cmd.CommandText = 'SELECT ModuleId, Name, MacAddress FROM Modules ORDER BY ModuleId'
\\$r = \\$cmd.ExecuteReader\(\); while\(\\$r.Read\(\)\) { Write-Host \('{0}  {1}  {2}' -f \\$r[0],\\$r[1],\\$r[2]\) }
\\$r.Close\(\)
\\$cmd.CommandText = 'SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM Sensors'
Write-Host \('Total sensors: ' + \\$cmd.ExecuteScalar\(\)\)
\\$cmd.CommandText = 'SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM Sensors WHERE RawUserData IS NOT NULL'
Write-Host \('Sensors with RawUserData: ' + \\$cmd.ExecuteScalar\(\)\)
\\$conn.Close\(\)
")

Bash(cd "F:\\Documents\\GitHub\\TemperatureMonitor\\BinWatchApp" && powershell -Command "
Add-Type -Path 'F:\\Documents\\GitHub\\TemperatureMonitor\\BinWatchApp\\System.Data.SQLite.dll'
\\$conn = New-Object System.Data.SQLite.SQLiteConnection\('Data Source=BinWatch.db;Version=3;Read Only=True;'\)
\\$conn.Open\(\)
\\$cmd = \\$conn.CreateCommand\(\)
\\$cmd.CommandText = 'SELECT RomCode, RawUserData, BinId, CableId, SensorNum, ModuleMac, FormatId FROM Sensors ORDER BY RawUserData'
\\$r = \\$cmd.ExecuteReader\(\)
while\(\\$r.Read\(\)\) { Write-Host \('{0}  raw={1}  bin={2} cable={3} sensor={4}  mac={5}  fmt={6}' -f \\$r[0],\\$r[1],\\$r[2],\\$r[3],\\$r[4],\\$r[5],\\$r[6]\) }
\\$conn.Close\(\)
")
Bash(cd "F:\\Documents\\GitHub\\TemperatureMonitor\\BinWatchApp" && powershell -Command "Select-String -Path BinWatch.log -Pattern '30830 OK' | Select-Object -Last 60 | ForEach-Object { \\$_.Line }")
